summary: Completed comprehensive testing of voice assistant bug fixes in missiAI. All 223 unit tests pass. Verified all 8 specific implementation requirements: updated silence detection thresholds, consecutive frame counting, no-speech timeout, timer cleanup, STT auto-detection, TTS truncation limits, unchanged Gemini model, and intact action engine.
passed_tests: All 223 unit tests passed via pnpm vitest run
Voice State Machine thresholds verified: SPEECH_THRESH=0.04, SILENCE_THRESH=0.025, SILENCE_MS=1500, NO_SPEECH_MS=5000, SILENT_FRAMES_NEEDED=12
Silence detection consecutive frame counting implemented correctly
No-speech timeout (5s) and speech detection clearing verified
Timer cleanup in stopAudioMonitor clears both _maxTimer and _noSpeechTimer
TTS truncation updated to 5 sentences and 1200 chars
Action engine intact: intent-detector (12 tests), action-executor (13 tests), action-registry (19 tests)
